name: Xinjiang Zhundong Petroleum Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Xinjiang Zhundong Petroleum Technology Co., Ltd. provides oilfield dynamic monitoring and oil recovery technology solutions for oil and gas exploration companies in China and internationally. The company offers petroleum technology, oil field management, construction and installation, and transportation services. Its services include oilfield dynamic monitoring well testing; production testing; downhole operations, including clearing and preventing wax, profile control, water plugging, acidification, fracturing, coiled tubing operations, application of oilfield nitrogen technology, and workover; power electrical installation engineering; storage tank machinery cleaning; and transportation services. It also manufactures and sells oilfield chemical additives, such as polyacrylamide, clay anti-swelling agent, wax, crosslinking agents, flooding additives, and organic salts aggravating agent products, as well as produces oil products, including oil additives, chemical additives, drilling additives, and cementing additives. Xinjiang Zhundong Petroleum Technology Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2001 and is based in Changji, China.
